description: Ranked fallback report types when the primary type is missing fields. The engine tries each alternative in order. Org-specific overrides are loaded from the org runbook if available.

notes.OpptywithProducts: Joins Opportunity with OpportunityLineItem - use when line-item fields needed
notes.OpptyContactRole: Joins Opportunity with OpportunityContactRole - use when contact info needed on opps
notes.AccountContact: Joins Account with Contact - use when both account and contact fields needed
notes.CampaignMember: Joins Campaign with CampaignMember - use when member-level detail needed
